## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] New plugin
- [ ] Plugin enhancement
- [ ] Pattern extraction (adding to `skills/shared/`)
- [ ] Infrastructure/tooling

## Related Issues

Closes # (issue number, if applicable)

## Testing Done

### Fresh Session Test

- [ ] Started fresh Claude Code session (no plugins)
- [ ] Added marketplace from local fork
- [ ] Installed the modified plugin
- [ ] Verified command appears in `/help` (if applicable)

### Execution Test

- [ ] Ran primary command
- [ ] Documented any expected errors (missing dependencies, vault structure)
- [ ] Output matches README description

### Cross-Plugin Test (if adding new plugin)

- [ ] Verified no conflicts with existing plugins
- [ ] Tested with 2+ plugins installed simultaneously

## Documentation

- [ ] README accurately describes the plugin/changes
- [ ] Any requirements or dependencies are documented
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for significant changes)

## Showcase Philosophy

- [ ] I've read CONTRIBUTING.md and understand this is a reference implementation
- [ ] My changes fit the "study and adapt" philosophy
- [ ] No sensitive data or personal information included

## Screenshots/Output

If applicable, add screenshots or command output showing the feature working.

Anything specific you'd like feedback on?
